summary: Landing Page Redesign Testing (Iteration 155) completed successfully. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend landing page loads correctly with: hero section showing 'Turn stories into cinematic videos using AI', 'Create Your First Video' CTA linking to /signup, navigation with Gallery/How It Works/Pricing/Login/Start Creating, 3-step How It Works section, 6 clickable prompt templates, gallery section with real videos from /api/pipeline/gallery, More Creator Tools section (Reel Scripts, Photo to Comic, GIF Creator, Comic Storybook), pricing section (Free 10/Starter 100/Pro 1000 credits), social proof bar, footer with legal links, and mobile menu toggle. Credits changed from 100 to 10 confirmed in auth.py lines 340, 653, 691. Signup page shows '10 free credits on signup!'. Pricing page shows 'Start with 10 free credits'. No regressions in app routes - login redirects correctly and dashboard loads.

issues: Cookie consent banner overlays bottom UI elements - minor visual issue, doesn't block functionality

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and gallery data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesign completed and tested. Hero section positions Story→Video as main feature. Gallery API at /api/pipeline/gallery is PUBLIC (no auth). Credits changed from 100 to 10 for new signups. All existing app routes (/app/dashboard, /app/story-video-studio) still work. Previous iterations 153-154 confirmed all 6 main features working.
